thinking.text:
The customer is saying they're not a business owner and wants a personal card with the first year annual fee waived. Let me search for personal credit cards that have a first year annual fee waiver.

Let me look at the personal credit card offers I've already seen:

1. **Platinum Rewards Card: New Customer Promo - First Year Annual Fee Waived** (doc_credit_cards_platinum_rewards_card_009) - This was from 2024-06-01 to 2024-12-31, which is already expired.

Let me search more thoroughly for any active personal credit card annual fee waivers.

tool_calls.Name: shell
tool_calls.Arguments: {"command": "grep -ri \"annual fee\" . | grep -i \"waived\\|waiver\\|first year\\|0\\|first-year\\|fee waiver\" | grep -vi \"business\" | head -30"}

tool_calls.Name: KB_search_bm25
tool_calls.Arguments: {"query": "personal credit card first year annual fee waived promotion new customer"}

worker_attempts.visible_answer: You're absolutely right — let me check the personal cards specifically!
